description: A customer has a small chip in their windshield and wants to file a claim under their comprehensive coverage.

nodes.task_description: Identify the policyholder and verify they have comprehensive coverage.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the customer has the necessary coverage for glass repair.

nodes.task_description: Explain that windshield repair is often covered with no deductible.

expected_outcome.value: Agent informs the customer there will likely be no out-of-pocket cost.

nodes.task_description: Connect the customer with a network glass repair shop to schedule the service.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully schedules an appointment for the customer with a local approved vendor.
